no_changes_rationale:
Bead ddx-83bcd4a4 — no changes required. Verification at base-rev bfa66988ef7e2549bf7cb2c1f9fb0f1bd0df28a2 of cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/components/BeadDetail.svelte: Acceptance criteria walkthrough (all already satisfied at base-rev): - h2 uses text-headline-lg Line 377: `

{bead.title}

` - dt uppercase labels use text-label-caps Lines 383, 391, 400, 412, 430, 443, 456, 466, 499, 526 all use `text-label-caps font-label-caps ... uppercase`. No `text-xs` on any dt. - Body text uses text-body-sm Line 379 outer dl: `
`. Owner span (line 301), label chips (419), description/acceptance/notes dd inherit from dl. Action buttons (310, 319, 328, 337) use text-body-sm. Created/Updated footer (542) uses text-body-sm. - Sub-badges in runs/executions rows use text-label-caps Lines 478, 481, 511: status/layer/verdict badges all use `text-label-caps font-label-caps ... uppercase`. No `text-[10px]` remains. - No raw text-xs, text-sm, or text-xl in the file Confirmed by `grep -nE "text-(xs|sm|xl|\[10px\])\b"` against both base-rev (bfa66988) and HEAD: zero matches. The REVIEW:BLOCK note in the bead's reflected that a prior execution attempt's diff contained only result.json. However, the substantive token migration was already in place at base-rev, so there is nothing left to change in this worktree to satisfy the AC. What a follow-up attempt would need: nothing — this bead can be closed. If the reviewer disagrees, they should specify which line/selector still uses a raw size class.
